title: Mr. Hung Cao to...
description: Full Committee Hearing on June 26, 2025 at 5:30 AM
text:
Full Committee Hearing
To consider the nominations of: Mr. Hung Cao to be Under Secretary of the Navy; Mr. Michael F. Dodd to be Assistant Secretary of Defense for Critical Technologies; Mr. Jules W. Hurst III to be Assistant Secretary of the Army for Manpower and Reserve Affairs; Mr. Brent G. Ingraham to be Assistant Secretary of the Army for Acquisition, Logistics, and Technology: and Mr. William J. Gillis to be Assistant Secretary of the Army for Installations, Energy and Environment
